results.title: Split Astro dev runtime from Minder backend
results.content: Added split local frontend-dev mode where Astro runs on 8808 and Minder backend stays on 8800. Dashboard config now supports dev_server_url redirects for /dashboard routes, admin HTTP app enables CORS for the Astro dev origin, and frontend admin API resolves requests through API_URL bridged into PUBLIC_API_URL by Astro config. Onboarding snippets remain dynamic: in local split mode they derive the backend origin from API requests so snippets point to 8800; in Docker/prod static same-origin mode they continue using request origin. Updated README, local setup, system design, and production deployment docs plus focused tests for config, dashboard scaffold, and console gate.

results.title: Dashboard integration flow guarded by server state
results.content: The Astro dashboard cannot be treated as a blind static site for admin flows. The correct integration is stateful at the Python layer: /dashboard redirects to /dashboard/setup when no admin exists, to /dashboard/login when admins exist but there is no valid session, and to /dashboard/clients when an admin session is present. Static asset requests under /dashboard must bypass those auth redirects. Frontend JSON admin calls should also redirect 401 responses back to login/setup so the browser flow stays coherent.

results.title: Admin route split and architecture docs refresh
results.content: Split admin HTTP presentation into context/api/dashboard modules, removed legacy Python-rendered dashboard handlers, shifted tests to Astro plus JSON admin APIs, and expanded README/operator guides with whole-system architecture diagrams and route responsibilities. routes.py remains only as a composition boundary in the presentation layer.

results.title: UI API error code documentation
results.content: Created detailed UI-facing documentation for backend error handling based on src/shared/error-codes.enum.ts, src/shared/domain-exception.ts, and src/shared/filters/domain-exception.filter.ts. The doc explains canonical DomainException response shape, legacy auth error codes still emitted by the filter (AUTH_1001, AUTH_1005, AUTH_1006, SYS_5001), handling priority for UI (errorCode -> statusCode -> message -> details), grouped code catalog with recommended UX actions, and guidance to centralize error mapping in the UI. Added docs link in findtourgoUI/docs/README.md.

results.title: Onboarding snippets follow request origin
results.content: Changed admin onboarding and connection-test template generation so HTTP routes derive the public base URL from request.base_url and pass it into the admin use case. This removes hardcoded localhost values from dashboard snippets and makes deployed domains show correctly, while keeping localhost as a fallback for pure use-case or unit-test calls without request context.
